rawText:
Subject: Q3 resource plan — action required

Jerome — need your updated staffing matrix and risk log by EOD Thursday. Please confirm availability for a 15-min sync tomorrow.

Subject: Shadow Inbox staging build ready

New dev client build is on the shared drive. Please install and run through the bulk-send regression checklist before Friday.

Subject: Timesheet reminder

Friendly reminder: timesheets for this pay period are due tonight at 11:59 PM ET.
